formulas.name: FITT Principle
formulas.formula: Specific components of fitness training: Frequency, Intensity, Time, Type
formulas.variables: Frequency (how often), Intensity (how hard), Time (how long), Type (what exercise)
formulas.notes: To be applied in planning and designing fitness and exercise programs

formulas.name: Periodization
formulas.formula: Progressive increase in intensity and volume over time
formulas.notes: To be applied in planning and designing training programs to avoid plateaus and prevent overtraining

formulas.name: Overtraining Syndrome
formulas.formula: Prolonged and excessive physical training leading to fatigue, decreased performance, and risk of injury
formulas.notes: To be recognized and managed to prevent negative consequences on physical and mental health

formulas.name: Specificity Principle
formulas.formula: Training should be specific to the sport and position to be performed with maximum efficiency
formulas.notes: To be applied in planning and designing training programs for athletes

formulas.name: Deliberate Practice
formulas.formula: Focused and structured training to improve performance and skills
formulas.notes: To be applied in training programs to optimize learning and performance

formulas.name: Periodization Model
formulas.formula: Microcycle (1-4 weeks), Mesocycle (4-20 weeks), Macrocycle (20-52 weeks)
formulas.notes: To be applied in planning and designing training programs for long-term performance and development
